testcase.name: test_get_testimonials

failure.message: assert False + where False = isinstance({'data': [{'active': True, 'content': 'Alfa Global transformed my financial future! Their expert guidance helped me grow my investments and plan for retirement with confidence.', 'createdAt': '2025-11-25T03:36:06.683000', 'id': 'test1', ...}, {'active': True, 'content': 'The team at Alfa Global is top-notch. Their personalized approach to wealth management gave me peace of mind knowing my finances are in good hands.', 'createdAt': '2025-11-25T03:36:06.683000', 'id': 'test2', ...}, {'active': True, 'content': "Trust, transparency, and results—that's what Alfa Global delivers. Their expertise helped me optimize my portfolio and secure my family's financial future.", 'createdAt': '2025-11-25T03:36:06.683000', 'id': 'test3', ...}], 'success': True}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_newsletter_api.py:138: in test_get_testimonials assert isinstance(data, list) E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'data': [{'active': True, 'content': 'Alfa Global transformed my financial future! Their expert guidance helped me grow my investments and plan for retirement with confidence.', 'createdAt': '2025-11-25T03:36:06.683000', 'id': 'test1', ...}, {'active': True, 'content': 'The team at Alfa Global is top-notch. Their personalized approach to wealth management gave me peace of mind knowing my finances are in good hands.', 'createdAt': '2025-11-25T03:36:06.683000', 'id': 'test2', ...}, {'active': True, 'content': "Trust, transparency, and results—that's what Alfa Global delivers. Their expertise helped me optimize my portfolio and secure my family's financial future.", 'createdAt': '2025-11-25T03:36:06.683000', 'id': 'test3', ...}], 'success': True}, list)

testcase.name: test_get_insights

failure.message: assert False + where False = isinstance({'data': [{'category': 'Market Analysis', 'content': 'As we navigate through 2024, the financial landscape continues to evolve with new opportunities and challenges. Our expert team analyzes current market trends and provides strategic insights for investors looking to maximize their returns while managing risk effectively.', 'createdAt': '2025-11-25T03:36:06.687000', 'date': '2024-03-15T00:00:00', ...}, {'category': 'Wealth Management', 'content': "Wealth preservation requires a comprehensive approach that balances growth potential with risk management. Learn about the latest strategies our advisors recommend for protecting and growing your family's assets across generations.", 'createdAt': '2025-11-25T03:36:06.687000', 'date': '2024-02-20T00:00:00', ...}, {'category': 'Investment Strategy', 'content': 'Alternative investments continue to gain traction among sophisticated investors seeking diversification and enhanced returns. Discover the latest opportunities in private equity, hedge funds, and other alternative asset classes.', 'createdAt': '2025-11-25T03:36:06.687000', 'date': '2024-01-10T00:00:00', ...}], 'success': True}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_newsletter_api.py:149: in test_get_insights assert isinstance(data, list) E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'data': [{'category': 'Market Analysis', 'content': 'As we navigate through 2024, the financial landscape continues to evolve with new opportunities and challenges. Our expert team analyzes current market trends and provides strategic insights for investors looking to maximize their returns while managing risk effectively.', 'createdAt': '2025-11-25T03:36:06.687000', 'date': '2024-03-15T00:00:00', ...}, {'category': 'Wealth Management', 'content': "Wealth preservation requires a comprehensive approach that balances growth potential with risk management. Learn about the latest strategies our advisors recommend for protecting and growing your family's assets across generations.", 'createdAt': '2025-11-25T03:36:06.687000', 'date': '2024-02-20T00:00:00', ...}, {'category': 'Investment Strategy', 'content': 'Alternative investments continue to gain traction among sophisticated investors seeking diversification and enhanced returns. Discover the latest opportunities in private equity, hedge funds, and other alternative asset classes.', 'createdAt': '2025-11-25T03:36:06.687000', 'date': '2024-01-10T00:00:00', ...}], 'success': True}, list)
